content:
## Page Section / Title
Typography

## All Verbatim Text
- "Brand Guidelines | by Sightbox"
- "PLUS"
- "JAKARTA"
- "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ"
- "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz"
- "0123456789 @#$%&*?!{(<"
- "1.1 Typography"
- "PRIMARY"
- "The primary typeface defines the core visual identity of our content. It is used consistently across headlines, subheadings, and body text to create a cohesive and recognizable look. This font enhances readability while reinforcing our brand's tone and style, providing an engaging user experience across all platforms. As a Google Font, it ensures fast access, optimized performance, seamless integration, and broad compatibility across all platforms."
- "Thin Italic"
- "ExtraLight Italic"
- "Light Italic"
- "Regular Italic"
- "Medium Italic"
- "SemiBold Italic"
- "Bold Italic"
- "ExtraBold Italic"
- "Heavy Italic"

## Visual Elements
- **Typography**: The primary typeface is "PLUS JAKARTA" (displayed in large, bold, uppercase letters). Sample text includes the full alphabet (uppercase and lowercase), numerals, and common symbols. The typeface is shown in multiple weights: Thin Italic, ExtraLight Italic, Light Italic, Regular Italic, Medium Italic, SemiBold Italic, Bold Italic, ExtraBold Italic, and Heavy Italic. The font is described as a Google Font for accessibility and compatibility.

## Page Layout Summary
The page has a clean, minimalist layout with a white background. The top-left corner contains the "Brand Guidelines | by Sightbox" text. The center of the page features large, bold "PLUS JAKARTA" typography, followed by a full alphabet, numerals, and symbols. Below this, the "1.1 Typography" section is on the left, with explanatory text. To the right of the typography section, the various font weights (Italic variants) are listed in three columns. The overall arrangement is centered and balanced, with ample white space.

## Design Rules / Guidance Visible on Page
- The primary typeface ("PLUS JAKARTA") is used consistently across headlines, subheadings, and body text to ensure a cohesive look.
- The font enhances readability and reinforces the brand's tone/style.
- As a Google Font, it ensures fast access, optimized performance, seamless integration, and broad compatibility across all platforms.
